response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song '輝夜の城で踊りたい' (Kaguya no Shiro de Odoritai) from on-screen text. Used search string '輝夜の城で踊りたい Love Live! Japanese and English lyrics' to find the lyrics. Performed by Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, and Shiranui Flare.
response.global_summary: A video segment featuring a song performance followed by a conversational segment by VTubers Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, and Shiranui Flare. The performance segment features the song 'Kaguya no Shiro de Odoritai' (輝夜の城で踊りたい) from the Love Live! franchise.

scenes.description: VTubers performing the song 'Kaguya no Shiro de Odoritai'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
おいで! おいで! 誘惑の Dance again
おいでよおいで! 輝夜の城へ
出逢いがあやつるミステリー
危険な罠

おいで! おいで! 誘惑の Dance again
おいでよおいで! 輝夜の城へ
月が見下ろしている
大丈夫と囁いてる

月に背を向けても
呼びかける声が聞こえる
バラの姫になりたい
あなたを愛す

(Spoken lines)

輝夜の城で踊りたい！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Come! Come! Dance again of temptation
Come! Come! To Kaguya's Castle
The mystery manipulated by the encounter
Is a dangerous trap

Come! Come! Dance again of temptation
Come! Come! To Kaguya's Castle
The moon is looking down
At us, whispering 'it's okay'

Even if I turn my back to the moon
I can still hear the voice calling out
I want to become a rose princess
Who loves you

(Spoken lines by characters)

Let's dance in Kaguya's Castle!
